title: Fermented Molten Jamaican Lamb Stir-Fry
description: A spicy, low-glycemic-friendly fermented molten dish featuring a flavorful Jamaican lamb stir-fry with crunchy lettuce. Pair with a side of warm pita bread.

ingredients.name: Ground lamb
ingredients.notes: Choose lean lamb for lower fat content.

ingredients.name: Fermented napa cabbage
ingredients.notes: For a fermented twist, use napa cabbage and ferment it for 1-2 days before using.

ingredients.name: Lettuce
ingredients.notes: Fresh or fermented, crisp lettuce adds crunch.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce (low-sodium)
ingredients.notes: Substitute with coconut aminos for a low-sodium option.

ingredients.name: Cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for desired heat level.

ingredients.name: Thyme
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried, adds a touch of earthiness.

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, sautéing for 1-2 minutes or until fragrant.
